Targeted enamel serum to help strengthen enamel and calm sensitivity over time.
Targeted enamel serum to help strengthen enamel and calm sensitivity over time.
LEARN HOW ENAMEL PROTECT PRO SERUM WORKS
Less sensitivity now, stronger enamel later

Everyday life can trigger tooth sensitivity. Iced coffees, cold treats, hot teas, hard brushing and some whitening solutions can put pressure on enamel and make you feel like you need to restrict yourself. Enamel Protect Pro Serum Pen is created tow work both short and long term to put you back in control. A precision brush coats specific sensitive areas for on the go spot treatment when you feel a flare up, and consistent use as part of your night routine supports enamel so teeth feel more resilient over time

Enamel support with
hydroxyapatite
Hydroxyapatite is a calcium-rich mineral that helps support enamel remineralisation. Used regularly, it reinforces weakened areas and helps teeth feel stronger and more resilient to hot and cold.
Made with care and unconditionally loved by our customers.

Soothes sensitivity with
potassium citrate
Potassium citrate helps calm the nerve response inside the tooth to reduce the feeling of sensitivity. Applied directly to areas of concern, it delivers targeted relief when you need it most.
How to use your Enamel Pen

Add this simple step after brushing to make your oral care routine work harder for sensitive teeth, and keep it with you for instant spot treatment when you need it.

Use Enamel Protect Pro Serum Pen on clean, dry teeth for your long term enamel care, then reach for it on the go whenever sensitivity appears. Twist, brush a thin layer onto the sensitive tooth or area, and let the serum sit. No rinsing. No extra fuss. Just an easy enamel serum step that fits your night routine and your day bag.
Twist and apply
Twist the base of the pen to release a small amount of enamel serum and brush it onto the sensitive areas, or across your teeth for an overnight serum application
Let it sit, then smile

Allow the serum to coat the enamel without rinsing. Wait a few minutes before eating or drinking anything, then get back to your day or settle into bed.

You can use the Enamel Pen once or twice a day as a night time enamel treatment, and also tap it onto specific spots during the day whenever sensitivity flares.
Step one
HOW TO USE
STEP 1
Twist the base of the pen up to 20 times, or until gel appears on the brush tip.
Step one
HOW TO USE
STEP 2
Apply directly to sensitive areas of the teeth as needed.
Developed by Dentists

“As dentists, we see every day how sensitivity and enamel wear can hold people back. Patients skip their favourite food and drinks, avoid whitening or chew on one side of their mouth because they are worried about that sharp twinge. We created Enamel Protect Pro Serum Pen as a simple, dual action step. A precision pen you can reach for in the moment when sensitivity hits, and a nightly enamel treatment that supports and protects over time. So you can feel comfortable and confident saying yes again.”

Dr Lisa and Dr Vanessa Creaven, Co Founders of Spotlight Oral Care
Real moments, zero flinch
Introducing Spotlight Oral Care

Breathe. Sleep. Smile.

The single-use mouth tape is a specially designed adhesive strip that gently holds the lips closed to encourage nasal breathing during sleep, reducing mouth breathing, improving sleep quality, and supporting oral health by preventing dry mouth, bad breath, and tooth decay.

  • Improves sleep quality
  • Prevents morning breath
  • Prevents dry mouth
  • Reduces teeth grinding
  • Encourages better jaw alignment
MADE BY DENTISTS

“As dentists, we see every day how sensitivity and enamel wear can hold people back. Patients skip their favourite food and drinks, avoid whitening or chew on one side of their mouth because they are worried about that sharp twinge. We created Enamel Protect Pro Serum Pen as a simple, dual action step. A precision pen you can reach for in the moment when sensitivity hits, and a nightly enamel treatment that supports and protects over time. So you can feel comfortable and confident saying yes again.”

Dr. Lisa Creaven & Dr. Vanessa Creaven
Co-Founders of Spotlight Oral Care
Frequently asked questions

settings.heading: Who is Enamel Protect Pro Serum Pen for?

settings.text: Anyone who experiences tooth sensitivity, whatever the cause or anyone with worn enamel. It is ideal if you want targeted on the go help when sensitivity flares and extra enamel support as part of your nightly oral care routine.

settings.heading: Can I use it with whitening products or sensitivity toothpaste?

settings.text: Yes. The Enamel Pen is designed to fit into your existing routine. Use it after brushing with your regular or sensitivity toothpaste as a nightly enamel treatment step, and alongside your whitening products. You can also apply it during the day directly to specific areas for extra support.

settings.heading: How often should I use the Enamel Pen?

settings.text: For best results, use once or twice a day on clean teeth, for example as part of your night routine. You can also keep the pen in your bag for quick top ups on specific sensitive spots whenever they show up.

settings.heading: When will I notice a difference?

settings.text: Many people feel more comfortable as they start using the pen directly on sensitive areas when they need it. Enamel support and soothing benefits are designed to build over time with consistent nightly use, so sensitivity feels less intense and less frequent.

settings.heading: Is Enamel Protect Pro Serum Pen suitable for everyday use?

settings.text: Yes. The dentist developed formula is gentle and enamel safe, so it is suitable for regular use as directed, both as a daily enamel treatment and as an on the go spot serum. If you have specific dental concerns, we always recommend checking with your dentist.
